source_flags.CB: Crunchbase — company profile data imported from a Crunchbase export: funding rounds, investors, industry classifications, headquarters, team.
source_flags.EDF: European Defence Fund — participant data from the European Commission EDF funding programme. Includes PIC identifier, EU contribution, calls and projects.
source_flags.iShares: iShares ETF — holdings data from BlackRock iShares ETFs: Metals & Mining (GICS 151040), Technology (GICS 45), Communication Services (GICS 50), Aerospace & Defense (GICS 201010).
source_flags.WD: Wikidata — structured open data retrieved from Wikidata: legal name, country, founding date, headquarters, employee count, ISIN, Wikipedia link.
source_flags.INF: Infonodes — internal database fields: canonical name, country, website, sector focus, tax ID and manually curated attributes.
